name: The Forest
author: ops@refx.example
description: Co-op open-world survival horror. SteamCMD Windows dedicated server run via Wine; port and slots are written into config.cfg on install.

installScript.script:
#!/bin/bash
# ReFx steamcmd shim — the steamcmd image ships no `steamcmd` on PATH; bootstrap
# it so the egg's steamcmd calls resolve (otherwise the server never downloads).
if ! command -v steamcmd >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamcmd
  curl -sSL https://steamcdn-a.akamaihd.net/client/installer/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz | tar zxf - -C /mnt/server/steamcmd || { echo "ERROR: failed to fetch steamcmd"; exit 1; }
  chmod +x /mnt/server/steamcmd/steamcmd.sh /mnt/server/steamcmd/linux32/steamcmd 2>/dev/null || true
  printf '#!/bin/sh\nexec /mnt/server/steamcmd/steamcmd.sh "$@"\n' > /usr/local/bin/steamcmd
  chmod +x /usr/local/bin/steamcmd
fi
set -euo pipefail
mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamapps
cd /mnt/server
steamcmd +@sSteamCmdForcePlatformType windows +force_install_dir /mnt/server +login anonymous +app_update 556450 validate +quit
mkdir -p /mnt/server/TheForestDedicatedServer_Data/forest/config
cat > /mnt/server/TheForestDedicatedServer_Data/forest/config/config.cfg <<EOFCFG
serverName ${SERVER_NAME}
serverIP 0.0.0.0
serverSteamPort 8766
serverGamePort ${SERVER_PORT}
serverQueryPort ${QUERY_PORT}
serverPlayers ${MAX_PLAYERS}
enableVAC on
difficulty Normal
initType ${INIT_TYPE}
slot 1
EOFCFG
echo 'The Forest install complete.'

variables.description: New wipes the save; Continue resumes it.
